module.name: no-raw-sql-interpolation
module.description: Disallow interpolated raw SQL and unsafe raw query helpers.

scenarios.name: should allow parameterized SQL calls and approved SQL tags
scenarios.given: code that passes literal SQL with separate parameters or uses a configured safe SQL tag
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the query expression

scenarios.name: should report interpolated or concatenated SQL passed to sinks
scenarios.given: code that passes a template literal with expressions or a string concatenation to a SQL sink
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the sink call

scenarios.name: should report unsafe raw SQL helpers
scenarios.given: code that calls queryRawUnsafe or executeRawUnsafe helpers
scenarios.then: an unsafeRawSql violation is reported even for literal strings
